payload.answer: I did not store a durable memory for this article because the fetch failed (404/network error). I only have an unverified user request to remember a missing URL for a possible future article about memory architecture, which is not strong enough to commit as current knowledge.
citations: User-provided reason: useful for memory architecture

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be fetched, so no durable fact about its contents can be verified or stored safely.

details: Fetch failed for the requested URL.
No verified article content was available to summarize or store.
To avoid storing potentially incorrect or nonexistent information, no memory card was created.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a working URL so the contents can be verified before storing.
If you want a lightweight reminder instead of durable knowledge, resubmit as a task/reminder to revisit the URL.
Confirm whether the URL is correct or provide an archived copy.
